sourceMovie.title: Anniversary
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Anniversary works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The thriller and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Panic Room
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Anniversary clicked for you, Panic Room (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and drama, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Anniversary?
faq.answer: Try Panic Room, In the Line of Fire, The Experiment—each shares DNA with Anniversary while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Anniversary?
faq.answer: Anniversary (2025) is best described as Thriller, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Anniversary worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
